name: Prune PWA capability playground and keep product-only RM mobile flows
motivation: The PWA demo page currently mixes product behavior with generic browser capability showcases (notifications/storage/camera/mic demos). This blurs product boundaries and creates demo-ware maintenance overhead.
intended_experience: RM mobile experiences expose only PRD-required flows (recording, transcription pathing, transcript review/upload, and related customer actions), without generic capability-demo cards.
constraints: Preserve working edge and worker transcription paths required by PRD section 4.2.
Do not remove product-critical install or authentication UX by accident.
Retain test coverage for product flows after removing demo cards.
